sector.name: Real Estate
sector.description: Branded developers scaling launches and cash flows

fyPerformance: FY26 residential pre-sales stood at ₹3,405 Cr
Q4FY26 residential pre-sales were strong at ₹1,633 Cr
Combined residential plus IC pre-sales stood around ₹4,120 Cr
Collections crossed ₹2,100 Cr and operating cash flow stood at ₹840 Cr
Balance sheet remains very strong with net debt to equity at negative 0.27x

guidance.value: Approvals in place; anchor client awaited

highlights: FY26 was supported by residential launches, sustenance sales and industrial cluster monetisation
Sustenance sales contributed around 40% of residential sales
Key launches included Blossom, Marina 64, New Haven, Citadel, Tower L and Lakewoods Chennai
Mahindra Rainforest Phase 1 has received RERA approval
Thane is being planned as a large mixed-use project
IC business remained strong, led by Jaipur and Chennai leasing traction
Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd.quote: "Mahindra Lifespaces is outperforming the sector on balance sheet strength, GDV addition, IC monetisation and strong FY27 launch visibility."
